## Summary

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Example:

> "When I try to migrate an agent from X to Y, I have to manually..."

## Proposed Solution

How you'd like it to work. Include code examples if helpful:

```python
# Example usage
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've explored.

## Framework Adapter Request

If requesting a new adapter:
- Framework name & version:
- Link to framework's state API docs:
- Framework's state format (JSON, pickle, custom):
